name: Austin Gold Corp.
description: Austin Gold Corp. is a gold exploration company focused on making district-scale gold discoveries in Nevada, USA. The company's portfolio includes several highly prospective projects located in prolific gold-producing trends, such as the Kelly Creek Project, the Lone Mountain Project, the Miller Project, and the Stockade Mountain Project in Oregon. Austin Gold is led by an experienced management team with a proven track record of significant discoveries and successful mine development.
